title: pelargonium × tussilaginifolium
intro: Pelargonium × tussilaginifolium, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family and is native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × tussilaginifolium lie in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
